output.answer:
The highest attendance figure for a game between the Los Angeles Dodgers and Philadelphia Phillies in a National League Championship Series does not exist in Wikidata. After multiple SPARQL queries to find games matching the criteria (Dodgers vs Phillies in NLCS), no results were returned. This indicates that the two teams have never faced each other in the National League Championship Series according to the available data.

<answer>
The Los Angeles Dodgers and Philadelphia Phillies have never faced each other in the National League Championship Series. Therefore, there is no highest attendance figure for such a game.
</answer>
